info.title: APIs for NVIDIA RAG Server (v1)
info.description: This API schema describes all the retriever endpoints exposed for NVIDIA RAG server Blueprint

get.description: Perform a health check on the RAG server.
Exposes aggregated metrics for Multi-worker setup across all workers.

Get Server Default Configuration

Returns the default configuration values used by the RAG server.
These values are derived from the server's environment variables and configuration.

Use this endpoint to:
- Display actual default values in the UI
- Understand what values will be used when parameters are not explicitly set
- Ensure frontend and backend defaults are synchronized

post.description: Generate and stream the response to the provided prompt.
Just an alias function to /generate endpoint which is openai compatible
Search for the most relevant documents for the given search parameters.

get.description: Retrieve document summary from the collection. Fetches pre-generated summaries with support for both blocking and non-blocking modes.

citations.description: Sources or citations supporting the response

metrics.description: Latency metrics associated with the request

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: Type of streaming chunk. None for non-streaming and for the regular (non-agentic) path's content chunks. Set for agentic-RAG streaming chunks; see ``nvidia_rag.rag_server.agentic_rag.streaming.EventType`` for the enumerated values (e.g. ``stage_start``, ``stage_end``, ``intermediate_reasoning``, ``intermediate_output``, ``final_reasoning``, ``final_answer``, ``agent_event``, ``error``).

stage.title: Stage
stage.description: Name of the agentic-RAG graph node that produced this chunk (e.g. ``initial_retrieval``, ``plan``, ``execute``, ``synthesize``, ``verify``, ``verify_execute``). Pairs with ``event_type`` so clients can group reasoning by pipeline stage without parsing event_type. None for non-agentic responses.

ChainResponse.title: ChainResponse
ChainResponse.description: Definition of Chain APIs resopnse data type

total_results.title: Total Results
total_results.description: Total number of source documents found

Citations.title: Citations
Citations.description: Represents the sources section of the API response.

ConfigurationResponse.title: ConfigurationResponse
ConfigurationResponse.description: Response containing all server default configuration values.

DatabaseHealthInfo.title: DatabaseHealthInfo
DatabaseHealthInfo.description: Health info specific to database services

query.title: Query
query.description: The content or keywords to search for within documents. Can be a string for text-only queries, or an array of content objects for multimodal queries containing text and/or images.

reranker_top_k.title: Reranker Top K
reranker_top_k.description: Number of document chunks to retrieve.

vdb_top_k.title: Vdb Top K
vdb_top_k.description: Number of top results to retrieve from the vector database.

vdb_endpoint.title: Vdb Endpoint
vdb_endpoint.description: Endpoint url of the vector database server.

collection_names.title: Collection Names
collection_names.description: Name of the collections in the vector database.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far. The roles of the messages must be alternating between user and assistant. The last input message should have role user. A message with the the system role is optional, and must be the very first message if it is present.

enable_reranker.title: Enable Reranker
enable_reranker.description: Enable or disable reranking by the ranker model.

enable_filter_generator.title: Enable Filter Generator
enable_filter_generator.description: Enable or disable automatic filter expression generation from natural language.

embedding_model.title: Embedding Model
embedding_model.description: Name of the embedding model used for vectorization.

embedding_endpoint.title: Embedding Endpoint
embedding_endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for the embedding model server.

reranker_model.title: Reranker Model
reranker_model.description: Name of the reranker model used for ranking results.

reranker_endpoint.title: Reranker Endpoint
reranker_endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for the reranker model server.

filter_expr.title: Filter Expr
filter_expr.description: Filter expression to filter the retrieved documents from vector database collection.

confidence_threshold.title: Confidence Threshold
confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score threshold for filtering chunks. Only chunks with relevance scores >= this threshold will be included. Range: 0.0 to 1.0. Default: 0.0 (no filtering). Note: Requires enable_reranker=True to generate relevance scores.

enable_citations.title: Enable Citations
enable_citations.description: Enable or disable image/table/chart citations as part of response.

DocumentSearch.title: DocumentSearch
DocumentSearch.description: Definition of the DocumentSearch API data type.

enable_reranker.title: Enable Reranker
enable_reranker.description: Whether reranker is enabled by default

enable_citations.title: Enable Citations
enable_citations.description: Whether citations are enabled by default

enable_guardrails.title: Enable Guardrails
enable_guardrails.description: Whether guardrails are enabled by default

enable_query_rewriting.title: Enable Query Rewriting
enable_query_rewriting.description: Whether query rewriting is enabled by default

enable_vlm_inference.title: Enable Vlm Inference
enable_vlm_inference.description: Whether VLM inference is enabled by default

enable_filter_generator.title: Enable Filter Generator
enable_filter_generator.description: Whether filter generator is enabled by default

url.title: Url
url.description: Either a URL of the image or the base64 encoded image data. Supports data URIs in the format data:image/jpeg;base64,<base64-data>

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Specifies the detail level for image processing. This field maintains OpenAI API compatibility but may not affect processing in NVIDIA RAG's internal VLM pipeline. Future integrations may utilize this field.

role.title: Role
role.description: Role for a message: either 'user' or 'assistant' or 'system

content.title: Content
content.description: The input query/prompt to the pipeline. Can be a string for text-only messages, or an array of content objects for multimodal messages containing text and/or images.
content.default: Hello! What can you help me with?

reasoning_content.title: Reasoning Content
reasoning_content.description: Reasoning trace or intermediate output from the agentic RAG pipeline. Populated for streamed chunks whose ``event_type`` indicates a reasoning/intermediate event (stage announcements, intermediate-stage reasoning or output tokens, final-stage reasoning tokens). The user-facing answer is always streamed via ``content`` — this field is purely supplementary.

Message-Input.title: Message
Message-Input.description: Definition of the Chat Message type.

role.title: Role
role.description: Role for a message: either 'user' or 'assistant' or 'system

content.title: Content
content.description: The input query/prompt to the pipeline. Can be a string for text-only messages, or an array of content objects for multimodal messages containing text and/or images.
content.default: Hello! What can you help me with?

reasoning_content.title: Reasoning Content
reasoning_content.description: Reasoning trace or intermediate output from the agentic RAG pipeline. Populated for streamed chunks whose ``event_type`` indicates a reasoning/intermediate event (stage announcements, intermediate-stage reasoning or output tokens, final-stage reasoning tokens). The user-facing answer is always streamed via ``content`` — this field is purely supplementary.

Message-Output.title: Message
Message-Output.description: Definition of the Chat Message type.

rag_ttft_ms.title: Rag Ttft Ms
rag_ttft_ms.description: RAG time-to-first-token in milliseconds (populated in server wrapper)

context_reranker_time_ms.title: Context Reranker Time Ms
context_reranker_time_ms.description: Latency of the context reranker in milliseconds

retrieval_time_ms.title: Retrieval Time Ms
retrieval_time_ms.description: Latency to retrieve documents from VDB in milliseconds

llm_generation_time_ms.title: Llm Generation Time Ms
llm_generation_time_ms.description: Total time for LLM response generation in milliseconds

Metrics.title: Metrics
Metrics.description: Latency metrics associated with a single request.

NIMServiceHealthInfo.title: NIMServiceHealthInfo
NIMServiceHealthInfo.description: Health info specific to NIM services (LLM, embeddings, etc.)

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far. The roles of the messages must be alternating between user and assistant. The last input message should have role user. A message with the the system role is optional, and must be the very first message if it is present.

use_knowledge_base.title: Use Knowledge Base
use_knowledge_base.description: Whether to use a knowledge base

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: The sampling temperature to use for text generation. The higher the temperature value is, the less deterministic the output text will be. If unset, the model/provider default is used. It is not recommended to modify both temperature and top_p in the same call.

top_p.title: Top P
top_p.description: The top-p sampling mass used for text generation. The top-p value determines the probability mass that is sampled at sampling time. For example, if top_p = 0.2, only the most likely tokens (summing to 0.2 cumulative probability) will be sampled. If unset, the model/provider default is used. It is not recommended to modify both temperature and top_p in the same call.

min_tokens.title: Min Tokens
min_tokens.description: The minimum number of tokens to generate in any given call

ignore_eos.title: Ignore Eos
ignore_eos.description: Whether to ignore the EOS token and continue generating tokens after the EOS token is generated

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in any given call. Note that the model is not aware of this value,  and generation will simply stop at the number of tokens specified.

min_thinking_tokens.title: Min Thinking Tokens
min_thinking_tokens.description: Minimum number of thinking tokens to allocate for reasoning models. Enable thinking mode if either min_thinking_tokens or max_thinking_tokens is provided.

max_thinking_tokens.title: Max Thinking Tokens
max_thinking_tokens.description: Maximum number of thinking tokens to allocate for reasoning models. Enable thinking mode if either min_thinking_tokens or max_thinking_tokens is provided.

reranker_top_k.title: Reranker Top K
reranker_top_k.description: The maximum number of documents to return in the response.

vdb_top_k.title: Vdb Top K
vdb_top_k.description: Number of top results to retrieve from the vector database.

vdb_endpoint.title: Vdb Endpoint
vdb_endpoint.description: Endpoint url of the vector database server.

collection_names.title: Collection Names
collection_names.description: Name of the collections in the vector database.

enable_reranker.title: Enable Reranker
enable_reranker.description: Enable or disable reranking by the ranker model.

enable_guardrails.title: Enable Guardrails
enable_guardrails.description: Enable or disable guardrailing of queries/responses.

enable_citations.title: Enable Citations
enable_citations.description: Enable or disable citations as part of response.

enable_filter_generator.title: Enable Filter Generator
enable_filter_generator.description: Enable or disable automatic filter expression generation from natural language.

model.title: Model
model.description: Name of NIM LLM model to be used for inference.

llm_endpoint.title: Llm Endpoint
llm_endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for the llm model server.

embedding_model.title: Embedding Model
embedding_model.description: Name of the embedding model used for vectorization.

embedding_endpoint.title: Embedding Endpoint
embedding_endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for the embedding model server.

reranker_model.title: Reranker Model
reranker_model.description: Name of the reranker model used for ranking results.

reranker_endpoint.title: Reranker Endpoint
reranker_endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for the reranker model server.

vlm_model.title: Vlm Model
vlm_model.description: Name of the VLM model used for inference.

vlm_endpoint.title: Vlm Endpoint
vlm_endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for the VLM model server.

vlm_temperature.title: Vlm Temperature
vlm_temperature.description: The sampling temperature to use for VLM text generation.

vlm_top_p.title: Vlm Top P
vlm_top_p.description: The top-p sampling mass used for VLM text generation.

vlm_max_tokens.title: Vlm Max Tokens
vlm_max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate by the VLM.

vlm_max_total_images.title: Vlm Max Total Images
vlm_max_total_images.description: Maximum total images sent to VLM per request (query + context).

stop.title: Stop
stop.description: A string or a list of strings where the API will stop generating further tokens.The returned text will not contain the stop sequence.

filter_expr.title: Filter Expr
filter_expr.description: Filter expression to filter documents from vector database. Can be a string or a list of dictionaries with filter conditions.

confidence_threshold.title: Confidence Threshold
confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score threshold for filtering chunks. Only chunks with relevance scores >= this threshold will be included. Range: 0.0 to 1.0. Default: 0.0 (no filtering). Note: Requires enable_reranker=True to generate relevance scores.

agentic.title: Agentic
agentic.description: Route this request through the agentic RAG pipeline (LangGraph plan-and-execute). When None (default), the server-level CONFIG.enable_agentic_rag config value is used. Explicitly passing True or False overrides the server default for this request.

enable_streaming.title: Enable Streaming
enable_streaming.description: Stream intermediate reasoning, stage announcements, and final-answer tokens as they are produced. Currently honored by the agentic RAG pipeline; the regular (non-agentic) pipeline always streams. When False on the agentic path, the graph runs to completion and the full answer is returned as a single SSE chunk (legacy behavior).

Prompt.title: Prompt
Prompt.description: Definition of the Prompt API data type.

RAGHealthResponse.title: RAGHealthResponse
RAGHealthResponse.description: Health response for RAG server with database, storage, and NIM services

vdb_top_k.title: Vdb Top K
vdb_top_k.description: Default number of documents to retrieve from vector DB

reranker_top_k.title: Reranker Top K
reranker_top_k.description: Default number of documents after reranking

RagConfigurationDefaults.title: RagConfigurationDefaults
RagConfigurationDefaults.description: Default values for RAG configuration parameters.

ServiceStatus.title: ServiceStatus
ServiceStatus.description: Enum for service health status values.

height.title: Height
height.description: Height of the document in pixels

width.title: Width
width.description: Width of the document in pixels

location.title: Location
location.description: Bounding box location of the content

SourceMetadata.title: SourceMetadata
SourceMetadata.description: Metadata associated with a document source.

stage.title: Stage
stage.description: Pipeline stage that produced this result (e.g. 'rag', 'initial_retrieval', 'execute', 'verify_execute')

SourceResult.title: SourceResult
SourceResult.description: Represents a single source document result.

StorageHealthInfo.title: StorageHealthInfo
StorageHealthInfo.description: Health info specific to object storage services

status.title: Status
status.description: Status of the summary: SUCCESS (completed), PENDING (queued), IN_PROGRESS (generating), FAILED (error occurred), or NOT_FOUND (never requested)

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Summary content (only present if status is SUCCESS)

error.title: Error
error.description: Error details if status is FAILED

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: ISO format timestamp when generation started

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: ISO format timestamp when generation completed

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: ISO format timestamp of last status update

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Progress information if status is IN_PROGRESS

SummaryResponse.title: SummaryResponse
SummaryResponse.description: Represents a summary of a document with status tracking.

total_tokens.title: Total Tokens
total_tokens.description: Total tokens used in the request
